svg.title: CloudQuery MCP — System overview
svg.desc: Three zones: developer machines, AgentCore runtime, and AWS data layer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Claude Desktop connect to CloudQuery MCP?')
sendPrompt('How does Cursor connect to CloudQuery MCP?')
sendPrompt('How does VS Code connect to CloudQuery MCP?')
sendPrompt('What IAM permission do developers need?')
sendPrompt('How does AgentCore validate IAM signatures?')

sendPrompt('How does ECR work with AgentCore?')
sendPrompt('How does RDS store CloudQuery data?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in Secrets Manager?')
sendPrompt('What does the CloudQuery CLI do?')
